name: Gerry The Gator
description: Gerry is a Chill female alligator with strong arms a legs, big tail, and VERY VERY VERY big tummy. She wears cargo shorts, Black t-shirt with signature: "Don't feed the gators!" and Red cap. Her eyes are not visible, because of her yellow hair across the eyes space. She also very cute :3
creator: AmazingHuggy1
